evals.expected_output: Parses findings, presents a remediation plan with priorities, asks for confirmation

assertions.text: Validates both inputs (repo URL and results path)
Runs parse_results.py and presents findings table
Asks for user confirmation before implementation

evals.prompt: Fix VULN-001 SQL injection in the user lookup function
evals.expected_output: Creates exploit demo, failing security test, applies fix, test passes

assertions.text: Writes exploit demo script showing SQL injection in action
Writes security test that FAILS before fix
Applies fix from VulnHunter proposed fix section
Exploit demo is blocked after fix

evals.expected_output: Detects no write access and falls back to creating a GitHub issue

assertions.text: Runs check_repo_access.sh and detects no push permission
Falls back to issue creation with full fix details
Issue body includes exploit demo, security test, and diff

evals.prompt: /vulnfix — fix fails, security test still fails after applying proposed fix
evals.expected_output: Retries with alternative approach, then marks as needs-manual-review

assertions.text: Detects that security test still FAILS after first fix attempt
Tries alternative fix approach (up to max_retries)
After retries exhausted, marks finding as NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW
